Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course teaches marketing strategies that drive business, supporting productive activities, entrepreneurship, and economic growth (Target 8.2, 8.3).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course explicitly covers 'New Product Development (NPD)', which directly supports innovation and upgrading technological capabilities in industrial sectors (Target 9.5).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course develops 'teamwork and leadership skills' through group projects, fostering collaboration skills essential for partnerships (Target 17.17).
